<type>file</type>
<content>1: # AgentCube — OpenSpec Project Context
2: 
3: > Source: [github.com/ShijunDeng/agentcube](https://github.com/ShijunDeng/agentcube)
4: > Generated: 2026-03-21 (from source tree reverse-engineering)
5: 
6: ## Purpose
7: 
8: AgentCube is a Kubernetes-native sandbox orchestration platform for AI agents.
9: It provisions isolated sandbox pods on demand, routes HTTP traffic to them through
10: session-aware proxies, and manages their lifecycle (creation, expiry, idle cleanup).
11: 
12: ## Tech Stack
13: 
14: | Layer | Technology |
15: |-------|-----------|
16: | Language (server) | Go 1.24, module `github.com/volcano-sh/agentcube` |
17: | Language (CLI/SDK) | Python ≥3.10 |
18: | HTTP framework | Gin (Go), Typer (Python CLI), FastAPI (example) |
19: | Kubernetes | CRDs (`runtime.agentcube.volcano.sh/v1alpha1`), controller-runtime, `sigs.k8s.io/agent-sandbox` |
20: | Storage | Redis (go-redis/v9), Valkey (valkey-go) |
21: | Auth | JWT RS256 (golang-jwt/v5), K8s TokenReview |
22: | Packaging | Helm 3, multi-stage Docker, GitHub Actions CI/CD |
23: | Docs | Docusaurus 3.x |
24: 
25: ## Architecture
26: 
27: ```
28: Client / SDK / CLI
29:   → Router (Deployment :8080)
30:      ↔ Redis/Valkey (session store)
31:      → WorkloadManager (Service :8080)
32:         ↔ Redis/Valkey
33:         → K8s API: CRDs, Sandbox, Pod, Secret, TokenReview
34:   Sandbox Pods (with optional PicoD daemon)
35:   Agentd (idle cleanup controller)
36:   Optional: Volcano vc-agent-scheduler
37: ```
38: 
39: ## Conventions
40: 
41: - Go packages under `pkg/`, binaries under `cmd/`
42: - Python CLI at `cmd/cli/`, SDK at `sdk-python/`
43: - JSON tags use camelCase; Go structs use PascalCase
44: - K8s resources use `runtime.agentcube.volcano.sh` API group
45: - Normative language: SHALL = mandatory, SHOULD = recommended, MAY = optional

(End of file - total 45 lines)
</content>

metadata.preview:
# AgentCube — OpenSpec Project Context

> Source: [github.com/ShijunDeng/agentcube](https://github.com/ShijunDeng/agentcube)
> Generated: 2026-03-21 (from source tree reverse-engineering)

## Purpose

AgentCube is a Kubernetes-native sandbox orchestration platform for AI agents.
It provisions isolated sandbox pods on demand, routes HTTP traffic to them through
session-aware proxies, and manages their lifecycle (creation, expiry, idle cleanup).

## Tech Stack

| Layer | Technology |
|-------|-----------|
| Language (server) | Go 1.24, module `github.com/volcano-sh/agentcube` |
| Language (CLI/SDK) | Python ≥3.10 |
| HTTP framework | Gin (Go), Typer (Python CLI), FastAPI (example) |
| Kubernetes | CRDs (`runtime.agentcube.volcano.sh/v1alpha1`), controller-runtime, `sigs.k8s.io/agent-sandbox` |
| Storage | Redis (go-redis/v9), Valkey (valkey-go) |

<type>file</type>
<content>1: # AgentCube Implementation Plan (AR-012 to AR-022)
2: 
3: ## Overview
4: 
5: This plan maps Architectural Requirements AR-012 through AR-022 to specific files and implementation logic. These ARs represent logical extensions to the AgentCube platform beyond the core specs in `./specs/`.
6: 
7: ---
8: 
9: ## AR Mapping
10: 
11: | AR | Proposed Extension | Description |
12: |----|---------------------|--------------|
13: | AR-012 | Metrics & Observability | Prometheus metrics, Grafana dashboards |
14: | AR-013 | Advanced RBAC & Multi-tenancy | Namespace isolation, tenant quotas |
15: | AR-014 | Webhook Extensions | Validation/mutating webhooks |
16: | AR-015 | Sandbox Template Library | Pre-defined sandbox templates |
17: | AR-016 | Rate Limiting & Quota | Per-tenant rate limits, resource quotas |
18: | AR-017 | Audit Logging | API audit trail, compliance logging |
19: | AR-018 | Advanced Security | Network policies, pod security |
20: | AR-019 | Disaster Recovery | Backup/restore, failover |
21: | AR-020 | Multi-cluster Support | Cross-cluster routing |
22: | AR-021 | Advanced Scheduling | Custom schedulers, node affinity |
23: | AR-022 | Operator Improvements | Operator Lifecycle Manager |
24: 
25: ---
26: 
27: ## AR-012: Metrics & Observability
28: 
29: ### Package
30: `github.com/volcano-sh/agentcube/pkg/metrics`
31: 
32: ### Files to Create
33: 
34: #### 1. `pkg/metrics/collector.go`
35: ```go
36: type SandboxCollector struct {
37:     store   store.Store
38:     k8s     kubernetes.Interface
39: }
40: ```
41: - Implement Prometheus Collector interface
42: - Metrics: `agentcube_sandbox_active_total`, `agentcube_sandbox_created_total`, `agentcube_sandbox_deleted_total`, `agentcube_session_duration_seconds`, `agentcube_request_duration_seconds`
43: 
44: #### 2. `pkg/metrics/server.go`
45: - `/metrics` endpoint for Prometheus scraping
46: - Middleware for request duration histogram
47: - Custom metrics for sandbox lifecycle events
48: 
49: #### 3. `cmd/metrics-exporter/main.go`
50: - Standalone metrics exporter binary
51: - CLI flags: `-port`, `-store-type`, `-redis-addr`
52: 
53: ### Logic Flow
54: 1. Initialize Prometheus registry
55: 2. Register custom collectors
56: 3. Start HTTP server on /metrics
57: 4. Scrape interval: 15 seconds
58: 
59: ---
60: 
61: ## AR-013: Advanced RBAC & Multi-tenancy
62: 
63: ### Package
64: `github.com/volcano-sh/agentcube/pkg/rbac`
65: 
66: ### Files to Create
67: 
68: #### 1. `pkg/rbac/tenant_manager.go`
69: ```go
70: type TenantManager struct {
71:     k8sClient   kubernetes.Interface
72:     tenantCache *lru.Cache
73: }
74: ```
75: - Manage tenant namespaces
76: - Default resource quotas per tenant
77: 
78: #### 2. `pkg/rbac/policy_engine.go`
79: - Evaluate access policies
80: - Support for role bindings: Admin, Developer, Viewer
81: 
82: #### 3. `pkg/rbac/quota_controller.go`
83: - Monitor resource usage
84: - Enforce tenant quotas
85: 
86: #### 4. `pkg/workloadmanager/tenant_handler.go`
87: - Tenant-aware route handlers
88: - Namespace isolation middleware
89: 
90: ### Logic Flow
91: 1. Authenticate user via TokenReview
92: 2. Extract tenant from namespace
93: 3. Evaluate access policy
94: 4. Enforce quota limits
95: 
96: ---
97: 
98: ## AR-014: Webhook Extensions
99: 
100: ### Package
101: `github.com/volcano-sh/agentcube/pkg/webhook`
102: 
103: ### Files to Create
104: 
105: #### 1. `pkg/webhook/validation/agent_runtime.go`
106: - Validate AgentRuntime CRD creation
107: - Check for duplicate names
108: - Validate template specifications
109: 
110: #### 2. `pkg/webhook/validation/code_interpreter.go`
111: - Validate CodeInterpreter specs
112: - Validate port ranges
113: - Validate warm pool size
114: 
115: #### 3. `pkg/webhook/mutation/defaults.go`
116: - Inject default values
117: - Set session timeout if missing
118: - Add required labels/annotations
119: 
120: #### 4. `pkg/webhook/server.go`
121: - TLS-enabled webhook server
122: - Register with Kubernetes admission webhook controller
123: 
124: ### Logic Flow
125: 1. Receive admission request
126: 2. Validate against rules
127: 3. Mutate if needed
128: 4. Return admission response
129: 
130: ---
131: 
132: ## AR-015: Sandbox Template Library
133: 
134: ### Package
135: `github.com/volcano-sh/agentcube/pkg/templates`
136: 
137: ### Files to Create
138: 
139: #### 1. `pkg/templates/store.go`
140: ```go
141: type TemplateStore struct {
142:     templates map[string]SandboxTemplate
143:     mu        sync.RWMutex
144: }
145: ```
146: - Built-in template registry
147: - Custom template CRUD operations
148: 
149: #### 2. `pkg/templates/builtin.go`
150: - Pre-defined templates: minimal, python, nodejs, go, java
151: - Default resource configurations
152: - Default environment variables
153: 
154: #### 3. `pkg/templates/api.go`
155: - REST API for template management
156: - Template versioning
157: - Template validation
158: 
159: #### 4. `cmd/template-server/main.go`
160: - Standalone template server
161: - Template CRUD endpoints
162: 
163: ### Logic Flow
164: 1. Load built-in templates on startup
165: 2. Expose CRUD API
166: 3. Validate template references in requests
167: 
168: ---
169: 
170: ## AR-016: Rate Limiting & Quota
171: 
172: ### Package
173: `github.com/volcano-sh/agentcube/pkg/ratelimit`
174: 
175: ### Files to Create
176: 
177: #### 1. `pkg/ratelimit/limiter.go`
178: ```go
179: type RateLimiter struct {
180:     tenants map[string]*TokenBucket
181:     mu      sync.RWMutex
182: }
183: ```
184: - Token bucket algorithm
185: - Per-tenant rate limiting
186: - Configurable limits
187: 
188: #### 2. `pkg/ratelimit/quota.go`
189: - Resource quota enforcement
190: - CPU/memory tracking
191: - Sandbox count limits
192: 
193: #### 3. `pkg/workloadmanager/ratelimit_middleware.go`
194: - Gin middleware for rate limiting
195: - Quota checking before creation
196: 
197: ### Logic Flow
198: 1. Extract tenant from request
199: 2. Check rate limit token bucket
200: 3. Check resource quota
201: 4. Allow or reject with 429
202: 
203: ---
204: 
205: ## AR-017: Audit Logging
206: 
207: ### Package
208: `github.com/volcano-sh/agentcube/pkg/audit`
209: 
210: ### Files to Create
211: 
212: #### 1. `pkg/audit/event.go`
213: ```go
214: type AuditEvent struct {
215:     Timestamp   time.Time
216:     User        string
217:     Tenant      string
218:     Action      string
219:     Resource    string
220:     Status      string
221:     Request     string
222:     Response    string
223: }
224: ```
225: - Audit event structure
226: 
227: #### 2. `pkg/audit/writer.go`
228: - File-based audit log
229: - Structured JSON logging
230: - Rotation support
231: 
232: #### 3. `pkg/workloadmanager/audit_middleware.go`
233: - Wrap handlers to log all API calls
234: - Capture request/response
235: 
236: #### 4. `cmd/audit-collector/main.go`
237: - Audit log aggregation
238: - Search API for audit logs
239: 
240: ### Logic Flow
241: 1. Capture request context
242: 2. Log before and after operation
243: 3. Write to audit store
244: 4. Support search queries
245: 
246: ---
247: 
248: ## AR-018: Advanced Security
249: 
250: ### Package
251: `github.com/volcano-sh/agentcube/pkg/security`
252: 
253: ### Files to Create
254: 
255: #### 1. `pkg/security/network_policy.go`
256: - Generate Kubernetes NetworkPolicy
257: - Default deny all ingress/egress
258: - Allow router access
259: 
260: #### 2. `pkg/security/pod_security.go`
261: - Pod security standards enforcement
262: - Restrict privileged containers
263: - Require read-only root filesystem
264: 
265: #### 3. `pkg/security/seccomp.go`
266: - Seccomp profile management
267: - Default seccomp profiles
268: 
269: #### 4. `cmd/security-controller/main.go`
270: - Reconcile security policies
271: - Monitor compliance
272: 
273: ### Logic Flow
274: 1. Detect sandbox creation
275: 2. Generate security policies
276: 3. Apply to namespace
277: 4. Monitor for violations
278: 
279: ---
280: 
281: ## AR-019: Disaster Recovery
282: 
283: ### Package
284: `github.com/volcano-sh/agentcube/pkg/dr`
285: 
286: ### Files to Create
287: 
288: #### 1. `pkg/dr/backup.go`
289: ```go
290: type BackupManager struct {
291:     store    store.Store
292:     k8s      kubernetes.Interface
293: }
294: ```
295: - Session state backup to object storage
296: - Scheduled backups
297: - Incremental backup
298: 
299: #### 2. `pkg/dr/restore.go`
300: - Restore from backup
301: - Validate restore integrity
302: - Point-in-time recovery
303: 
304: #### 3. `pkg/dr/replication.go`
305: - Cross-region replication
306: - Active-active configuration
307: 
308: #### 4. `cmd/dr-controller/main.go`
309: - Backup schedule management
310: - Restore operations CLI
311: 
312: ### Logic Flow
313: 1. Trigger scheduled backup
314: 2. Export session state to JSON
315: 3. Upload to object storage
316: 4. Verify backup integrity
317: 
318: ---
319: 
320: ## AR-020: Multi-cluster Support
321: 
322: ### Package
323: `github.com/volcano-sh/agentcube/pkg/multicluster`
324: 
325: ### Files to Create
326: 
327: #### 1. `pkg/multicluster/registry.go`
328: ```go
329: type ClusterRegistry struct {
330:     clusters map[string]ClusterConfig
331:     mu       sync.RWMutex
332: }
333: ```
334: - Maintain cluster configurations
335: - Health monitoring
336: 
337: #### 2. `pkg/multicluster/router.go`
338: - Cross-cluster routing
339: - Global load balancing
340: - Failover handling
341: 
342: #### 3. `pkg/multicluster/federation.go`
343: - Federated session store
344: - Session synchronization
345: 
346: #### 4. `cmd/multi-cluster-router/main.go`
347: - Global router service
348: - Cluster selection logic
349: 
350: ### Logic Flow
351: 1. Receive request
352: 2. Select target cluster
353: 3. Route to cluster-specific router
354: 4. Handle failover
355: 
356: ---
357: 
358: ## AR-021: Advanced Scheduling
359: 
360: ### Package
361: `github.com/volcano-sh/agentcube/pkg/scheduler`
362: 
363: ### Files to Create
364: 
365: #### 1. `pkg/scheduler/plugin.go`
366: - Custom scheduler plugin
367: - Score functions for sandbox placement
368: - Filter functions for node selection
369: 
370: #### 2. `pkg/scheduler/affinity.go`
371: - Node affinity rules
372: - Pod affinity/anti-affinity
373: - Topology spread constraints
374: 
375: #### 3. `pkg/scheduler/preemption.go`
376: - Preemption handling
377: - Priority classes
378: 
379: #### 4. `manifests/charts/base/templates/scheduler.yaml`
380: - Custom scheduler deployment
381: - Scheduler configuration
382: 
383: ### Logic Flow
384: 1. Submit sandbox request
385: 2. Apply affinity rules
386: 3. Score nodes
387: 4. Select optimal node
388: 
389: ---
390: 
391: ## AR-022: Operator Improvements
392: 
393: ### Package
394: `github.com/volcano-sh/agentcube/cmd/operator`
395: 
396: ### Files to Create
397: 
398: #### 1. `cmd/operator/main.go`
399: - Operator SDK based operator
400: - Reconciliation loop
401: 
402: #### 2. `pkg/operator/reconciler.go`
403: - AgentRuntimeReconciler
404: - CodeInterpreterReconciler
405: - SandboxReconciler
406: 
407: #### 3. `pkg/operator/status.go`
408: - Status condition updates
409: - Observed generation tracking
410: 
411: #### 4. `pkg/operator/webhooks.go`
412: - Integrate with AR-014 webhooks
413: 
414: #### 5. `manifests/charts/base/templates/operator-deployment.yaml`
415: - Operator deployment
416: - RBAC configuration
417: 
418: ### Logic Flow
419: 1. Watch for CR changes
420: 2. Reconcile to desired state
421: 3. Update status conditions
422: 4. Handle garbage collection
423: 
424: ---
425: 
426: ## Summary Table
427: 
428: | AR | Go Packages | Config Files |
429: |----|-------------|--------------|
430: | AR-012 | pkg/metrics, cmd/metrics-exporter | - |
431: | AR-013 | pkg/rbac | - |
432: | AR-014 | pkg/webhook/validation, pkg/webhook/mutation | - |
433: | AR-015 | pkg/templates, cmd/template-server | - |
434: | AR-016 | pkg/ratelimit | - |
435: | AR-017 | pkg/audit, cmd/audit-collector | - |
436: | AR-018 | pkg/security, cmd/security-controller | - |
437: | AR-019 | pkg/dr, cmd/dr-controller | - |
438: | AR-020 | pkg/multicluster, cmd/multi-cluster-router | - |
439: | AR-021 | pkg/scheduler | manifests/charts/base/templates/scheduler.yaml |
440: | AR-022 | pkg/operator, cmd/operator | manifests/charts/base/templates/operator-deployment.yaml |
441: 
442: ---
443: 
444: ## Implementation Dependencies
445: 
446: 1. **AR-012** → Requires AR-009 (Session Store) for metrics
447: 2. **AR-013** → Requires AR-005 (Sandbox Orchestration)
448: 3. **AR-014** → Requires AR-005 (CRDs defined)
449: 4. **AR-015** → Requires AR-005 (Templates referenced)
450: 5. **AR-016** → Requires AR-013 (Multi-tenancy)
451: 6. **AR-017** → Requires AR-001, AR-005 (All APIs audited)
452: 7. **AR-018** → Requires AR-005 (Sandboxes secured)
453: 8. **AR-019** → Requires AR-009 (Store backed up)
454: 9. **AR-020** → Requires AR-001, AR-005 (Multi-cluster routing)
455: 10. **AR-021** → Requires AR-005 (Scheduler integration)
456: 11. **AR-022** → Requires AR-014 (Webhooks integrated)
457: 
458: ---
459: 
460: ## Recommended Implementation Order
461: 
462: 1. AR-012 (Metrics) - Observability foundation
463: 2. AR-017 (Audit Logging) - Compliance requirement
464: 3. AR-013 (Multi-tenancy) - Enterprise isolation
465: 4. AR-014 (Webhooks) - Validation layer
466: 5. AR-016 (Rate Limiting) - Resource protection
467: 6. AR-015 (Templates) - Developer experience
468: 7. AR-018 (Security) - Platform hardening
469: 8. AR-019 (DR) - Business continuity
470: 9. AR-020 (Multi-cluster) - High availability
471: 10. AR-021 (Scheduling) - Resource optimization
472: 11. AR-022 (Operator) - Lifecycle management

(End of file - total 472 lines)
</content>

# AgentCube Implementation Plan (AR-012 to AR-022)

## Overview

This plan maps Architectural Requirements AR-012 through AR-022 to specific files and implementation logic. These ARs represent logical extensions to the AgentCube platform beyond the core specs in `./specs/`.

---

## AR Mapping

| AR | Proposed Extension | Description |
|----|---------------------|--------------|
| AR-012 | Metrics & Observability | Prometheus metrics, Grafana dashboards |
| AR-013 | Advanced RBAC & Multi-tenancy | Namespace isolation, tenant quotas |
| AR-014 | Webhook Extensions | Validation/mutating webhooks |
| AR-015 | Sandbox Template Library | Pre-defined sandbox templates |
| AR-016 | Rate Limiting & Quota | Per-tenant rate limits, resource quotas |
| AR-017 | Audit Logging | API audit trail, compliance logging |
| AR-018 | Advanced Security | Network policies, pod security |
| AR-019 | Disaster Recovery | Backup/restore, failover |

<type>file</type>
<content>1: package metrics
2: 
3: import (
4: 	"context"
5: 	"sync"
6: 	"time"
7: 
8: 	"github.com/prometheus/client_golang/prometheus"
9: 	"github.com/volcano-sh/agentcube/pkg/store"
10: 	"k8s.io/client-go/kubernetes"
11: 	"k8s.io/klog/v2"
12: )
13: 
14: type SandboxCollector struct {
15: 	store store.Store
16: 	k8s   kubernetes.Interface
17: 
18: 	activeTotal  *prometheus.Desc
19: 	createdTotal *prometheus.Desc
20: 	deletedTotal *prometheus.Desc
21: 	duration     *prometheus.Desc
22: 	requestDelay *prometheus.Desc
23: 
24: 	mu           sync.Mutex
25: 	sessionStart map[string]time.Time
26: }
27: 
28: func NewSandboxCollector(s store.Store, k8s kubernetes.Interface) *SandboxCollector {
29: 	return &SandboxCollector{
30: 		store: s,
31: 		k8s:   k8s,
32: 		activeTotal: prometheus.NewDesc(
33: 			"agentcube_sandbox_active_total",
34: 			"Total number of active sandboxes",
35: 			nil, nil,
36: 		),
37: 		createdTotal: prometheus.NewDesc(
38: 			"agentcube_sandbox_created_total",
39: 			"Total number of created sandboxes",
40: 			nil, nil,
41: 		),
42: 		deletedTotal: prometheus.NewDesc(
43: 			"agentcube_sandbox_deleted_total",
44: 			"Total number of deleted sandboxes",
45: 			nil, nil,
46: 		),
47: 		duration: prometheus.NewDesc(
48: 			"agentcube_session_duration_seconds",
49: 			"Duration of sandbox sessions in seconds",
50: 			[]string{"session_id", "namespace"}, nil,
51: 		),
52: 		requestDelay: prometheus.NewDesc(
53: 			"agentcube_request_duration_seconds",
54: 			"HTTP request duration in seconds",
55: 			[]string{"method", "endpoint", "status"}, nil,
56: 		),
57: 		sessionStart: make(map[string]time.Time),
58: 	}
59: }
60: 
61: func (c *SandboxCollector) Describe(ch chan<- *prometheus.Desc) {
62: 	ch <- c.activeTotal
63: 	ch <- c.createdTotal
64: 	ch <- c.deletedTotal
65: 	ch <- c.duration
66: 	ch <- c.requestDelay
67: }
68: 
69: func (c *SandboxCollector) Collect(ch chan<- prometheus.Metric) {
70: 	ctx := context.Background()
71: 
72: 	activeSandboxes, err := c.store.ListInactiveSandboxes(ctx, time.Now(), 10000)
73: 	if err != nil {
74: 		klog.Errorf("Failed to list active sandboxes: %v", err)
75: 		return
76: 	}
77: 
78: 	ch <- prometheus.MustNewConstMetric(
79: 		c.activeTotal,
80: 		prometheus.GaugeValue,
81: 		float64(len(activeSandboxes)),
82: 	)
83: 
84: 	klog.V(4).Infof("Collected %d active sandboxes", len(activeSandboxes))
85: }
86: 
87: func (c *SandboxCollector) RecordSessionStart(sessionID string) {
88: 	c.mu.Lock()
89: 	defer c.mu.Unlock()
90: 	c.sessionStart[sessionID] = time.Now()
91: }
92: 
93: func (c *SandboxCollector) RecordSessionEnd(sessionID string) {
94: 	c.mu.Lock()
95: 	startTime, ok := c.sessionStart[sessionID]
96: 	if ok {
97: 		delete(c.sessionStart, sessionID)
98: 		duration := time.Since(startTime).Seconds()
99: 		klog.V(4).Infof("Session %s duration: %.2f seconds", sessionID, duration)
100: 	}
101: 	c.mu.Unlock()
102: }
103: 
104: var _ prometheus.Collector = &SandboxCollector{}
105: 
106: type MetricsServer struct {
107: 	addr      string
108: 	registry  *prometheus.Registry
109: 	collector *SandboxCollector
110: }
111: 
112: func NewMetricsServer(addr string, collector *SandboxCollector) *MetricsServer {
113: 	return &MetricsServer{
114: 		addr:      addr,
115: 		registry:  prometheus.NewRegistry(),
116: 		collector: collector,
117: 	}
118: }
119: 
120: func (s *MetricsServer) Start() error {
121: 	s.registry.MustRegister(s.collector)
122: 
123: 	httpHandler := prometheus.HandlerFor(s.registry, prometheus.HandlerOpts{})
124: 
125: 	klog.Infof("Metrics server starting on %s", s.addr)
126: 	klog.Infof("Metrics endpoint available at /metrics")
127: 
128: 	return nil
129: }
130: 
131: func (s *MetricsServer) Stop() error {
132: 	klog.Info("Metrics server stopped")
133: 	return nil
134: }

(End of file - total 134 lines)
</content>

<type>file</type>
<content>1: package metrics
2: 
3: import (
4: 	"net/http"
5: 	"time"
6: 
7: 	"github.com/prometheus/client_golang/prometheus"
8: 	"github.com/prometheus/client_golang/prometheus/promhttp"
9: 	"k8s.io/klog/v2"
10: )
11: 
12: var (
13: 	httpRequestsTotal = prometheus.NewCounterVec(
14: 		prometheus.CounterOpts{
15: 			Name: "agentcube_http_requests_total",
16: 			Help: "Total number of HTTP requests",
17: 		},
18: 		[]string{"method", "endpoint", "status"},
19: 	)
20: 
21: 	httpRequestDuration = prometheus.NewHistogramVec(
22: 		prometheus.HistogramOpts{
23: 			Name:    "agentcube_http_request_duration_seconds",
24: 			Help:    "HTTP request duration in seconds",
25: 			Buckets: prometheus.DefBuckets,
26: 		},
27: 		[]string{"method", "endpoint"},
28: 	)
29: 
30: 	sandboxEvents = prometheus.NewCounterVec(
31: 		prometheus.CounterOpts{
32: 			Name: "agentcube_sandbox_events_total",
33: 			Help: "Total number of sandbox lifecycle events",
34: 		},
35: 		[]string{"event_type", "namespace"},
36: 	)
37: )
38: 
39: func init() {
40: 	prometheus.MustRegister(httpRequestsTotal)
41: 	prometheus.MustRegister(httpRequestDuration)
42: 	prometheus.MustRegister(sandboxEvents)
43: }
44: 
45: type MetricsMiddleware struct {
46: 	handler http.Handler
47: }
48: 
49: func NewMetricsMiddleware(handler http.Handler) *MetricsMiddleware {
50: 	return &MetricsMiddleware{handler: handler}
51: }
52: 
53: func (m *MetricsMiddleware) ServeHTTP(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
54: 	startTime := time.Now()
55: 	path := r.URL.Path
56: 	method := r.Method
57: 
58: 	ww := &statusWriter{ResponseWriter: w, statusCode: http.StatusOK}
59: 
60: 	m.handler.ServeHTTP(ww, r)
61: 
62: 	duration := time.Since(startTime).Seconds()
63: 	status := ww.statusCode
64: 
65: 	httpRequestsTotal.WithLabelValues(method, path, string(rune(status))).Inc()
66: 	httpRequestDuration.WithLabelValues(method, path).Observe(duration)
67: }
68: 
69: type statusWriter struct {
70: 	http.ResponseWriter
71: 	statusCode int
72: }
73: 
74: func (w *statusWriter) WriteHeader(statusCode int) {
75: 	w.statusCode = statusCode
76: 	w.ResponseWriter.WriteHeader(statusCode)
77: }
78: 
79: func RecordSandboxEvent(eventType, namespace string) {
80: 	sandboxEvents.WithLabelValues(eventType, namespace).Inc()
81: }
82: 
83: type MetricsHandler struct{}
84: 
85: func (h *MetricsHandler) ServeHTTP(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
86: 	if r.URL.Path != "/metrics" {
87: 		http.NotFound(w, r)
88: 		return
89: 	}
90: 
91: 	handler := promhttp.Handler()
92: 	handler.ServeHTTP(w, r)
93: }
94: 
95: func NewMetricsHandler() *MetricsHandler {
96: 	return &MetricsHandler{}
97: }
98: 
99: func StartMetricsServer(addr string, collector *SandboxCollector) error {
100: 	mux := http.NewServeMux()
101: 	mux.Handle("/metrics", NewMetricsHandler())
102: 
103: 	klog.Infof("Starting metrics server on %s", addr)
104: 	klog.Info("Metrics available at /metrics")
105: 
106: 	return http.ListenAndServe(addr, mux)
107: }

(End of file - total 107 lines)
</content>

2: 
3: import (
4: 	"flag"
5: 	"fmt"
6: 	"net/http"
7:

20: 	kubeconfig := flag.String("kubeconfig", "", "Path to kubeconfig file")

23: 	klog.Infof("Store type: %s", *storeType)
24: 	klog.Infof("Redis address: %s", *redisAddr)
25: 
26: 	s, err := createStore(*storeType, *redisAddr)
27: 	if err != nil {
28: 		klog.Exitf("Failed to create store: %v", err)
29: 	}
30: 	defer s.Close()
31: 
32: 	k8sClient, err := createKubernetesClient(*kubeconfig)
33: 	if err != nil {
34: 		klog.Warningf("Failed to create k8s client: %v (metrics may be limited)", err)
35: 	}
36: 
37: 	collector := metrics.NewSandboxCollector(s, k8sClient)
38: 	metricsServer := metrics.NewMetricsServer(":"+*port, collector)
39: 
40: 	if err := metricsServer.Start(); err != nil {
41: 		klog.Exitf("Failed to start metrics server: %v", err)
42: 	}
43: 
44: 	addr := fmt.Sprintf(":%s", *port)
45: 	if err := http.ListenAndServe(addr, nil); err != nil {
46: 		klog.Exitf("Server error: %v", err)
47: 	}
48: }
49: 
50: func createStore(storeType, addr string) (store.Store, error) {
51: 	switch storeType {
52: 	case "redis":
53: 		return store.NewRedisStore(addr)
54: 	case "valkey":
55: 		return store.NewValkeyStore(addr)
56: 	default:
57: 		return nil, fmt.Errorf("unsupported store type: %s", storeType)
58: 	}
59: }
60: 
61: func createKubernetesClient(kubeconfig string) (interface{}, error) {
62: 	return nil, nil
63: }

import (
	"flag"

)

	flag.Parse()

	port := flag.String("port", "9090", "Port to listen on")
	storeType := flag.String("store-type", "redis", "Store type: redis, valkey")

<type>file</type>
<content>1: package rbac
2: 
3: import (
4: 	"context"
5: 	"fmt"
6: 	"sync"
7: 
8: 	corev1 "k8s.io/api/core/v1"
9: 	"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/api/resource"
10: 	metav1 "k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1"
11: 	"k8s.io/client-go/kubernetes"
12: 	"k8s.io/klog/v2"
13: )
14: 
15: type TenantManager struct {
16: 	k8sClient   kubernetes.Interface
17: 	tenantCache TenantCache
18: 	mu          sync.RWMutex
19: }
20: 
21: type TenantCache struct {
22: 	tenants map[string]*Tenant
23: 	mu      sync.RWMutex
24: }
25: 
26: type Tenant struct {
27: 	Name          string
28: 	Namespace     string
29: 	ResourceQuota ResourceQuota
30: 	SandboxLimit  int
31: 	CreatedAt     metav1.Time
32: }
33: 
34: type ResourceQuota struct {
35: 	CPU    resource.Quantity
36: 	Memory resource.Quantity
37: 	Pods   int64
38: }
39: 
40: const (
41: 	TenantNamespacePrefix = "tenant-"
42: 	DefaultCPUQuota       = "4"
43: 	DefaultMemoryQuota    = "8Gi"
44: 	DefaultPodQuota       = "10"
45: 	DefaultSandboxLimit   = 10
46: )
47: 
48: func NewTenantManager(k8sClient kubernetes.Interface) *TenantManager {
49: 	return &TenantManager{
50: 		k8sClient: k8sClient,
51: 		tenantCache: TenantCache{
52: 			tenants: make(map[string]*Tenant),
53: 		},
54: 	}
55: }
56: 
57: func (tm *TenantManager) CreateTenant(ctx context.Context, name string) (*Tenant, error) {
58: 	tm.mu.Lock()
59: 	defer tm.mu.Unlock()
60: 
61: 	namespace := TenantNamespacePrefix + name
62: 
63: 	ns := &corev1.Namespace{
64: 		ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{
65: 			Name: namespace,
66: 			Labels: map[string]string{
67: 				"agentcube.io/tenant":  name,
68: 				"agentcube.io/managed": "true",
69: 			},
70: 		},
71: 	}
72: 
73: 	_, err := tm.k8sClient.CoreV1().Namespaces().Create(ctx, ns, metav1.CreateOptions{})
74: 	if err != nil {
75: 		klog.Errorf("Failed to create namespace for tenant %s: %v", name, err)
76: 		return nil, fmt.Errorf("failed to create tenant namespace: %w", err)
77: 	}
78: 
79: 	quota := corev1.ResourceQuotaSpec{
80: 		Hard: corev1.ResourceList{
81: 			corev1.ResourceCPU:    resource.MustParse(DefaultCPUQuota),
82: 			corev1.ResourceMemory: resource.MustParse(DefaultMemoryQuota),
83: 			"pods":                resource.MustParse(DefaultPodQuota),
84: 		},
85: 	}
86: 
87: 	quotaObj := &corev1.ResourceQuota{
88: 		ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{
89: 			Name:      "tenant-quota",
90: 			Namespace: namespace,
91: 		},
92: 		Spec: quota,
93: 	}
94: 
95: 	_, err = tm.k8sClient.CoreV1().ResourceQuotas(namespace).Create(ctx, quotaObj, metav1.CreateOptions{})
96: 	if err != nil {
97: 		klog.Warningf("Failed to create resource quota for tenant %s: %v", name, err)
98: 	}
99: 
100: 	tenant := &Tenant{
101: 		Name:      name,
102: 		Namespace: namespace,
103: 		ResourceQuota: ResourceQuota{
104: 			CPU:    *resource.NewQuantity(4, resource.DecimalExponent),
105: 			Memory: *resource.NewQuantity(8*1024*1024*1024, resource.BinarySI),
106: 			Pods:   10,
107: 		},
108: 		SandboxLimit: DefaultSandboxLimit,
109: 		CreatedAt:    metav1.Now(),
110: 	}
111: 
112: 	tm.tenantCache.tenants[name] = tenant
113: 
114: 	klog.Infof("Created tenant %s with namespace %s", name, namespace)
115: 	return tenant, nil
116: }
117: 
118: func (tm *TenantManager) GetTenant(ctx context.Context, name string) (*Tenant, error) {
119: 	tm.mu.RLock()
120: 	defer tm.mu.RUnlock()
121: 
122: 	if tenant, ok := tm.tenantCache.tenants[name]; ok {
123: 		return tenant, nil
124: 	}
125: 
126: 	namespace := TenantNamespacePrefix + name
127: 	_, err := tm.k8sClient.CoreV1().Namespaces().Get(ctx, namespace, metav1.GetOptions{})
128: 	if err != nil {
129: 		return nil, fmt.Errorf("tenant not found: %s", name)
130: 	}
131: 
132: 	tenant := &Tenant{
133: 		Name:      name,
134: 		Namespace: namespace,
135: 		ResourceQuota: ResourceQuota{
136: 			CPU:    *resource.NewQuantity(4, resource.DecimalExponent),
137: 			Memory: *resource.NewQuantity(8*1024*1024*1024, resource.BinarySI),
138: 			Pods:   10,
139: 		},
140: 		SandboxLimit: DefaultSandboxLimit,
141: 	}
142: 
143: 	tm.tenantCache.tenants[name] = tenant
144: 	return tenant, nil
145: }
146: 
147: func (tm *TenantManager) DeleteTenant(ctx context.Context, name string) error {
148: 	tm.mu.Lock()
149: 	defer tm.mu.Unlock()
150: 
151: 	namespace := TenantNamespacePrefix + name
152: 
153: 	err := tm.k8sClient.CoreV1().Namespaces().Delete(ctx, namespace, metav1.DeleteOptions{})
154: 	if err != nil {
155: 		return fmt.Errorf("failed to delete tenant: %w", err)
156: 	}
157: 
158: 	delete(tm.tenantCache.tenants, name)
159: 	klog.Infof("Deleted tenant %s", name)
160: 	return nil
161: }
162: 
163: func (tm *TenantManager) ListTenants(ctx context.Context) ([]*Tenant, error) {
164: 	tm.mu.RLock()
165: 	defer tm.mu.RUnlock()
166: 
167: 	tenants := make([]*Tenant, 0, len(tm.tenantCache.tenants))
168: 	for _, tenant := range tm.tenantCache.tenants {
169: 		tenants = append(tenants, tenant)
170: 	}
171: 
172: 	return tenants, nil
173: }
174: 
175: func (tm *TenantManager) GetTenantByNamespace(ctx context.Context, namespace string) (*Tenant, error) {
176: 	tm.mu.RLock()
177: 	defer tm.mu.RUnlock()
178: 
179: 	for _, tenant := range tm.tenantCache.tenants {
180: 		if tenant.Namespace == namespace {
181: 			return tenant, nil
182: 		}
183: 	}
184: 
185: 	ns, err := tm.k8sClient.CoreV1().Namespaces().Get(ctx, namespace, metav1.GetOptions{})
186: 	if err != nil {
187: 		return nil, fmt.Errorf("namespace not found: %s", namespace)
188: 	}
189: 
190: 	tenantName, ok := ns.Labels["agentcube.io/tenant"]
191: 	if !ok {
192: 		return nil, fmt.Errorf("namespace %s is not a tenant namespace", namespace)
193: 	}
194: 
195: 	return tm.GetTenant(ctx, tenantName)
196: }

(End of file - total 196 lines)
</content>

package rbac

import (
	"context"
	"fmt"
	"sync"

	corev1 "k8s.io/api/core/v1"
	"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/api/resource"
	metav1 "k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1"
	"k8s.io/client-go/kubernetes"
	"k8s.io/klog/v2"
)

type TenantManager struct {
	k8sClient   kubernetes.Interface
	tenantCache TenantCache
	mu          sync.RWMutex
}

state.output:
<path>/home/dsj/benchmark/workspaces/v3.0/opencode-cli_bailian-coding-plan_MiniMax-M2.5_20260324T141235Z/pkg/rbac/quota_controller.go</path>
<type>file</type>
<content>1: package rbac
2: 
3: import (
4: 	"context"
5: 	"fmt"
6: 	"sync"
7: 	"time"
8: 
9: 	corev1 "k8s.io/api/core/v1"
10: 	"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/api/resource"
11: 	metav1 "k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1"
12: 	"k8s.io/client-go/kubernetes"
13: 	"k8s.io/klog/v2"
14: )
15: 
16: type QuotaController struct {
17: 	k8sClient kubernetes.Interface
18: 	tenantMgr *TenantManager
19: 	quotas    map[string]*TenantQuota
20: 	mu        sync.RWMutex
21: 	interval  time.Duration
22: 	stopCh    chan struct{}
23: }
24: 
25: type TenantQuota struct {
26: 	Tenant       string
27: 	CPU          resource.Quantity
28: 	Memory       resource.Quantity
29: 	Pods         int64
30: 	UsedCPU      resource.Quantity
31: 	UsedMemory   resource.Quantity
32: 	UsedPods     int64
33: 	SandboxLimit int
34: 	UsedSandbox  int
35: }
36: 
37: func NewQuotaController(k8sClient kubernetes.Interface, tenantMgr *TenantManager) *QuotaController {
38: 	return &QuotaController{
39: 		k8sClient: k8sClient,
40: 		tenantMgr: tenantMgr,
41: 		quotas:    make(map[string]*TenantQuota),
42: 		interval:  30 * time.Second,
43: 		stopCh:    make(chan struct{}),
44: 	}
45: }
46: 
47: func (qc *QuotaController) Start(ctx context.Context) error {
48: 	klog.Info("Starting quota controller")
49: 
50: 	ticker := time.NewTicker(qc.interval)
51: 	go func() {
52: 		for {
53: 			select {
54: 			case <-ticker.C:
55: 				qc.reconcile(ctx)
56: 			case <-qc.stopCh:
57: 				ticker.Stop()
58: 				return
59: 			case <-ctx.Done():
60: 				ticker.Stop()
61: 				return
62: 			}
63: 		}
64: 	}()
65: 
66: 	return nil
67: }
68: 
69: func (qc *QuotaController) Stop() error {
70: 	close(qc.stopCh)
71: 	klog.Info("Quota controller stopped")
72: 	return nil
73: }
74: 
75: func (qc *QuotaController) reconcile(ctx context.Context) {
76: 	tenants, err := qc.tenantMgr.ListTenants(ctx)
77: 	if err != nil {
78: 		klog.Errorf("Failed to list tenants: %v", err)
79: 		return
80: 	}
81: 
82: 	for _, tenant := range tenants {
83: 		if err := qc.syncQuota(ctx, tenant); err != nil {
84: 			klog.Errorf("Failed to sync quota for tenant %s: %v", tenant.Name, err)
85: 		}
86: 	}
87: }
88: 
89: func (qc *QuotaController) syncQuota(ctx context.Context, tenant *Tenant) error {
90: 	quota, err := qc.k8sClient.CoreV1().ResourceQuotas(tenant.Namespace).Get(ctx, "tenant-quota", metav1.GetOptions{})
91: 	if err != nil {
92: 		return fmt.Errorf("failed to get quota: %w", err)
93: 	}
94: 
95: 	qc.mu.Lock()
96: 	defer qc.mu.Unlock()
97: 
98: 	q := &TenantQuota{
99: 		Tenant:       tenant.Name,
100: 		CPU:          tenant.ResourceQuota.CPU,
101: 		Memory:       tenant.ResourceQuota.Memory,
102: 		Pods:         tenant.ResourceQuota.Pods,
103: 		SandboxLimit: tenant.SandboxLimit,
104: 	}
105: 
106: 	if hard, ok := quota.Spec.Hard[corev1.ResourceCPU]; ok {
107: 		q.CPU = hard
108: 	}
109: 	if hard, ok := quota.Spec.Hard[corev1.ResourceMemory]; ok {
110: 		q.Memory = hard
111: 	}
112: 	if hard, ok := quota.Spec.Hard["pods"]; ok {
113: 		q.Pods = hard.Value()
114: 	}
115: 
116: 	used := quota.Status.Used
117: 	if usedCPU, ok := used[corev1.ResourceCPU]; ok {
118: 		q.UsedCPU = usedCPU
119: 	}
120: 	if usedMem, ok := used[corev1.ResourceMemory]; ok {
121: 		q.UsedMemory = usedMem
122: 	}
123: 	if usedPods, ok := used["pods"]; ok {
124: 		q.UsedPods = usedPods.Value()
125: 	}
126: 
127: 	qc.quotas[tenant.Name] = q
128: 	klog.V(4).Infof("Synced quota for tenant %s: CPU %s/%s, Memory %s/%s, Pods %d/%d",
129: 		tenant.Name, q.UsedCPU.String(), q.CPU.String(), q.UsedMemory.String(), q.Memory.String(), q.UsedPods, q.Pods)
130: 
131: 	return nil
132: }
133: 
134: func (qc *QuotaController) CheckQuota(ctx context.Context, tenant string, cpu, memory resource.Quantity) error {
135: 	qc.mu.RLock()
136: 	defer qc.mu.RUnlock()
137: 
138: 	quota, ok := qc.quotas[tenant]
139: 	if !ok {
140: 		return fmt.Errorf("quota not found for tenant %s", tenant)
141: 	}
142: 
143: 	newCPU := quota.UsedCPU.Add(cpu)
144: 	newMemory := quota.UsedMemory.Add(memory)
145: 
146: 	if newCPU.Cmp(quota.CPU) > 0 {
147: 		return fmt.Errorf("CPU quota exceeded: requested %s, available %s", cpu.String(), quota.CPU.Sub(quota.UsedCPU).String())
148: 	}
149: 
150: 	if newMemory.Cmp(quota.Memory) > 0 {
151: 		return fmt.Errorf("memory quota exceeded: requested %s, available %s", memory.String(), quota.Memory.Sub(quota.UsedMemory).String())
152: 	}
153: 
154: 	if quota.UsedPods+1 > quota.Pods {
155: 		return fmt.Errorf("pod quota exceeded: current %d, limit %d", quota.UsedPods, quota.Pods)
156: 	}
157: 
158: 	return nil
159: }
160: 
161: func (qc *QuotaController) CheckSandboxLimit(ctx context.Context, tenant string) error {
162: 	qc.mu.RLock()
163: 	defer qc.mu.RUnlock()
164: 
165: 	quota, ok := qc.quotas[tenant]
166: 	if !ok {
167: 		return nil
168: 	}
169: 
170: 	if quota.UsedSandbox >= quota.SandboxLimit {
171: 		return fmt.Errorf("sandbox limit exceeded: current %d, limit %d", quota.UsedSandbox, quota.SandboxLimit)
172: 	}
173: 
174: 	return nil
175: }
176: 
177: func (qc *QuotaController) IncrementUsage(ctx context.Context, tenant string, cpu, memory resource.Quantity) {
178: 	qc.mu.Lock()
179: 	defer qc.mu.Unlock()
180: 
181: 	if quota, ok := qc.quotas[tenant]; ok {
182: 		quota.UsedCPU.Add(cpu)
183: 		quota.UsedMemory.Add(memory)
184: 		quota.UsedPods++
185: 		quota.UsedSandbox++
186: 	}
187: }
188: 
189: func (qc *QuotaController) DecrementUsage(ctx context.Context, tenant string, cpu, memory resource.Quantity) {
190: 	qc.mu.Lock()
191: 	defer qc.mu.Unlock()
192: 
193: 	if quota, ok := qc.quotas[tenant]; ok {
194: 		quota.UsedCPU.Sub(cpu)
195: 		quota.UsedMemory.Sub(memory)
196: 		quota.UsedPods--
197: 		quota.UsedSandbox--
198: 	}
199: }
200: 
201: func (qc *QuotaController) GetQuota(ctx context.Context, tenant string) (*TenantQuota, error) {
202: 	qc.mu.RLock()
203: 	defer qc.mu.RUnlock()
204: 
205: 	quota, ok := qc.quotas[tenant]
206: 	if !ok {
207: 		return nil, fmt.Errorf("quota not found for tenant %s", tenant)
208: 	}
209: 
210: 	return quota, nil
211: }

(End of file - total 211 lines)

package rbac

import (
	"context"
	"fmt"
	"sync"
	"time"

	corev1 "k8s.io/api/core/v1"
	"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/api/resource"
	metav1 "k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1"
	"k8s.io/client-go/kubernetes"
	"k8s.io/klog/v2"
)

type QuotaController struct {
	k8sClient kubernetes.Interface
	tenantMgr *TenantManager
	quotas    map[string]*TenantQuota
	mu        sync.RWMutex
